heading: Exceptions from advertising requirement

children.heading: .—American Battle Monuments Commission
children.label: a .—American Battle Monuments Commission
children.text: does not apply to the American Battle Monuments Commission with respect to leases in foreign countries for office or garage space.Section 6101 of this title

children.heading: .—Bureau of Interparliamentary Union for Promotion of International Arbitration
children.label: b .—Bureau of Interparliamentary Union for Promotion of International Arbitration
children.text: does not apply to the Bureau of Interparliamentary Union for Promotion of International Arbitration with respect to necessary stenographic reporting services by contract.Section 6101 of this title

children.heading: .—Department of State
children.label: c .—Department of State
children.text: does not apply to the Department of State when the purchase or service relates to the packing of personal and household effects of Diplomatic, Consular, and Foreign Service officers and clerks for foreign shipment.Section 6101 of this title

children.heading: .—International Committee of Aerial Legal Experts
children.label: d .—International Committee of Aerial Legal Experts
children.text: does not apply to the International Committee of Aerial Legal Experts with respect to necessary stenographic and other services by contract.Section 6101 of this title

children.heading: .—Architect of the Capitol
children.label: e .—Architect of the Capitol
children.text: The purchase of supplies and equipment and the procurement of services for all branches under the Architect of the Capitol may be made in the open market according to common business practice, without compliance with , when the aggregate amount of the purchase or the service does not exceed $25,000 in any instance.section 6101 of this title

children.heading: .—Forest Products From Indian Reservations
children.label: f .—Forest Products From Indian Reservations
children.text: Lumber and other forest products produced by Indian enterprises from forests on Indian reservations may be sold under regulations the Secretary of the Interior prescribes, without compliance with .section 6101 of this title

children.heading: .—House of Representatives
children.label: g .—House of Representatives
children.text: does not apply to purchases and contracts for supplies or services for any office of the House of Representatives.Section 6101 of this title

children.heading: .—Congressional Budget Office
children.label: h .—Congressional Budget Office
children.text: The Director of the Congressional Budget Office may enter into agreements or contracts without regard to .section 6101 of this title

children.heading: .—Senate
children.label: i .—Senate
children.text: does not apply to agreements, contracts or purchases by any office of the Senate.Section 6101 of this title

children.heading: .—Librarian of Congress
children.label: j .—Librarian of Congress
children.text: does not apply to a procurement made against an order placed under a task order contract or a delivery order contract (as such terms are defined in ) entered into by the Librarian of Congress.Section 6101 of this titlesection 4101 of this title
